query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS country_repair_index (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  country_code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  country_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  vat_rate DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL,
  import_duty_rate DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL,
  avg_labour_rate_per_hour INT NOT NULL,
  currency_code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  effective_from VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id),
  INDEX idx_cri_country (country_code),
  INDEX idx_cri_effective (effective_from)
);

INSERT INTO country_repair_index (country_code, country_name, vat_rate, import_duty_rate, avg_labour_rate_per_hour, currency_code, effective_from)
SELECT 'ZA', 'South Africa', 0.1500, 0.0000, 65000, 'ZAR', '2024-01-01'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM country_repair_index WHERE country_code = 'ZA');

INSERT INTO country_repair_index (country_code, country_name, vat_rate, import_duty_rate, avg_labour_rate_per_hour, currency_code, effective_from)
SELECT 'ZW', 'Zimbabwe', 0.1500, 0.2500, 45000, 'USD', '2024-01-01'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM country_repair_index WHERE country_code = 'ZW');

INSERT INTO country_repair_index (country_code, country_name, vat_rate, import_duty_rate, avg_labour_rate_per_hour, currency_code, effective_from)
SELECT 'BW', 'Botswana', 0.1400, 0.1000, 50000, 'BWP', '2024-01-01'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM country_repair_index WHERE country_code = 'BW');
